seoDescription: Facciano HVAC and Sheet Metal — a family-owned, licensed heating, cooling, and custom sheet-metal contractor serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County since 2015.
heroHeading: Santa Rosa's Facciano family HVAC and sheet metal
heroSubheading: A family-owned, licensed heating, cooling, and sheet-metal contractor serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County since 2015.
aboutBody: Facciano HVAC and Sheet Metal is a family-run contractor based on Chanate Court in Santa Rosa, owned by brothers Mark and Carl Facciano. The company has been licensed and operating since 2015.

Holding California license #1009408 for warm-air heating, ventilating, air conditioning, and sheet-metal work, the team handles residential furnace and air-conditioning installation and replacement along with custom sheet-metal fabrication and ductwork for homes across the Santa Rosa area.

services.title: Heating & Furnace Installation
services.description: Installation and replacement of warm-air heating and furnace systems for Santa Rosa homes.

services.title: Air Conditioning
services.description: Residential AC installation and replacement to keep your home comfortable through Sonoma County summers.

services.title: Sheet Metal & Ductwork
services.description: Custom sheet-metal fabrication and ductwork, backed by the company's CSLB sheet-metal classification.

notes: Verified 2026-06-12 via CSLB/BBB/BuildZoom/NCBE chamber. Owners Mark Andrew & Carl Edwin Facciano (BuildZoom-confirmed brothers → family-run). License CSLB #1009408 active, exp 1/31/2027 (warm-air heating/vent/AC + sheet metal); older #718101 sheet-metal now inactive. Started 12/4/2015. Business address 3480 Chanate Ct, Santa Rosa 95404 (CSLB/BBB/BuildZoom); chamber listing shows an alternate mailing address at 2175 Bluebell Dr #C. Phone (707) 483-6754 corroborated on BOTH BBB and the chamber listing — chose it over BuildZoom's 975-5930 and the prior 540-1258, neither corroborated. NO official website exists (directory listings only). No public email, no published hours, no Google/Yelp star rating found — BBB is Not Rated, BuildZoom score 100 is a license-completeness metric, not customer reviews. No real photos located.
